name: founder-os
description: Manages founder business portfolio, signals, vault, and snapshots. Tracks business health, stores credentials securely, and generates AI-powered business analytics and recommendations.
capabilities: Register and manage multiple businesses and ventures in one portfolio
Track business signals including revenue, growth, engagement, and health metrics
Generate AI-powered health snapshots with SWOT analysis and recommendations
Store credentials securely with encryption and audit logging
Provide strategic recommendations based on performance data
Analyze options and support major business decisions with decision frameworks
author: CleanExpo
securitySummary: This skill contains ONLY documentation (SKILL.md). All 48 static findings are false positives caused by the scanner misidentifying markdown documentation text as executable code patterns. The triple-backticks (```) flagged as 'Ruby backtick execution' are markdown code block delimiters. References to AES-256 encryption are documentation about the credential vault feature, not weak crypto implementations. The skill has no executable code, network calls, file access, or command execution.
valueStatement: Founders struggle to monitor multiple ventures and metrics across businesses. Founder OS provides a unified command center to track signals, generate health snapshots, and make data-driven strategic decisions.
limitations: No real-time financial data integration with Stripe, AWS, or other services
No automated business actions without explicit founder approval
No competitor real-time monitoring or ML-based revenue forecasting

useCases.title: Multi-venture portfolio tracking
useCases.description: Monitor health and metrics across all registered businesses from one unified dashboard

useCases.title: Strategic decision support
useCases.description: Get data-driven analysis for hiring, fundraising, and market expansion decisions

useCases.title: Weekly health snapshots
useCases.description: Generate regular snapshots identifying risks, opportunities, and recommended actions

promptTemplates.title: Register business
promptTemplates.prompt: Register my [business name] startup in the [industry] sector. Details: [stage], [team size], [target market], [website]

promptTemplates.title: Check health
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a health snapshot for [business name] and show key metrics and trends from last month

promptTemplates.title: Strategic analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Should we [major decision]? Analyze our options using our current metrics and provide recommendations with pros and cons

promptTemplates.title: Vault management
promptTemplates.prompt: Store my [service] API key securely and set up automatic rotation every [time period]

bestPractices: Update metrics weekly for accurate health scoring and trend analysis
Use Extended Thinking for major strategic decisions like fundraising or pivots
Configure alerts for critical thresholds like runway under 6 months or churn spikes
antiPatterns: Relying solely on automated snapshots without manual review and founder judgment
Making automated business changes without explicit founder approval
Storing vault credentials without setting rotation schedules or audit logging

faq.question: What AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: Currently optimized for Claude. Support for Codex and Claude Code planned for future releases.

faq.question: How many businesses can I track?
faq.answer: No hard limit. All registered businesses appear in portfolio view with filtering and sorting options.

faq.question: Does it integrate with my existing tools?
faq.answer: Currently supports email and Slack for alerts. API integrations planned for future releases.

faq.question: How secure is the credential vault?
faq.answer: Uses AES-256 encryption with audit logging, time-limited access tokens, and automatic rotation.

faq.question: Why does my health score change?
faq.answer: Health scores update when new signals are tracked. Review snapshot details for contributing factors.

faq.question: How is this different from a spreadsheet?
faq.answer: Provides AI-powered analysis, automatic health scoring, trend detection, and strategic recommendations.
